title: chamaemelum corymbosum
intro: Chamaemelum corymbosum, also known as White Chamomile, is a low-growing, perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects. The health benefits of White Chamomile include reducing stress and anxiety, soothing digestive issues, and promoting a good night's sleep. The herbal preparations of Chamaemelum corymbosum include tea, essential oil, and dried flowers, which can be used in a variety of ways, such as adding to bath water or mixing with other herbs for a calming tea.
